seo.title: Pre and Postnatal Fitness Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Learn how to stay active during pregnancy and feel more comfortable with Pre and Postnatal Fitness. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainers here.

trainers.bioBodi: Barre Blend™ creator Elise Joan is a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. She is also the creator of Pre-/Postnatal Barre Blend and the “I Am” meditation series on Beachbody On Demand®. Deepen your mind/body connection and build a lean, shredded dancer’s physique with her barre, strength, yoga, and other live classes on BODi™.

Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

Idalis is an NASM certified personal trainer and creator of Beachbody’s Spanish-language workout program Mes de Más® and 30 Day Breakaway®, a running and resistance training program designed to get you 5K-ready in record time. Take her live strength, cardio, core, and cycling classes to start sculpting a slimmer, stronger, more athletic body today!

Desi has been teaching health and wellness for over 20 years. Her innovative approach to teaching is to tap into one’s inner joy and let movement be an outer expression of that state. Desi holds advanced certifications in Yoga, Pre & Postnatal Fitness, Personal Training, and Group Fitness.

data.descriptionShort: Feel healthier now and after your baby arrives with these safe, simple workouts.
data.descriptionLong: A healthy lifestyle means a happier mom. With Pre and Postnatal fitness and nutrition, you’ll discover how to care for your changing body during each stage of pregnancy, and after.

modules.title: Nutrition Programs Take Your Results Even Further
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have helped millions of people get control over food. Ultimate Portion Fix®, created by Autumn Calabrese, takes the guesswork out of eating the right portions while enjoying your favorite foods. With 2B Mindset®, created by Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, you can overcome emotional and mindless eating while enjoying satisfying meals––no measuring or counting required! For sustainable weight loss, choose the program that best fits your lifestyle and goals.

modules.title: Pregnant? Ilana Can Help You Too!
modules.content: 2B Pregnant is the first Beachbody nutrition program that helps you understand what to eat when you’re expecting. Ilana Muhlstein, MS, Registered Dietitian Nutritionist, and mom of 3, knows that the guidance for eating during pregnancy isn’t always clear. She designed 2B Pregnant to give you easy solutions to help get the healthy nutrition you and your growing baby need, while navigating the challenges of pregnancy. Learn strategies to help overcome obstacles like nausea, cravings, and exhaustion, and get tips to help manage a healthy weight gain, trimester-specific food trackers with meal and snack ideas, and guidance to get back on-track postpartum. And through it all, you’ll enjoy delicious, satisfying food with a positive mindset.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.
